title: Vilfa vinealis
taxonomy: Vilfa vinealis is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to Europe. Vilfa vinealis is classified as a perennial grass. intro: Vilfa vinealis, also known as Wild Lovage or Lovage, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apiaceae family, characterized by its tall stems and aromatic foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory health.
